title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: A Mixture of Experts podcast episode hosted by IBM Technology debates whether Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 justifies the hype, analyzing its tier routing system as a Mythos-class model. The panel also discusses Apple's shift away from on-device AI to partner with NVIDIA for cloud compute at WWDC 2026, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm using multimodal inputs or context alone.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts episode from IBM Technology debates whether Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 lives up to its hype, examining its tier routing system and its positioning as a Mythos-class model. The panel also covers Apple's reported pivot away from on-device AI toward a partnership with NVIDIA for cloud compute, announced at WWDC 2026, and weighs the implications of that shift. A third segment asks whether AI models can detect sarcasm, considering multimodal inputs versus context alone.
